where_to_eat.name: Back-alley Village Food Spots
where_to_eat.description: Local eateries with plastic chairs serving authentic Malaysian cuisine. Described as having some of the best meals with genuine local character.

into_the_wild.name: KLCC Park
into_the_wild.description: Urban park near Petronas Twin Towers that is particularly beautiful after dark and unbeatable for viewing the city skyline.

into_the_wild.name: Bukit Kiara
into_the_wild.description: Scenic hilltop location in Kuala Lumpur offering elevated viewpoints of the city and surrounding landscape.

into_the_wild.name: Genting Highlands
into_the_wild.description: Highland destination outside KL that provides stunning panoramic views of the Kuala Lumpur skyline and is known as 'The City of Dreams'.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Petronas Twin Towers
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic skyscrapers in KLCC that are especially photogenic at night, making them a must-capture location for visitors.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Brickfields Area
gram_worthy_spots.description: Neighborhood known for street photography opportunities, including memorable shots of local cats and vibrant street scenes.

gram_worthy_spots.name: IG-Worthy Street Art Location
gram_worthy_spots.description: A discovered street art spot that has gained popularity on Instagram for its aesthetic appeal and photogenic qualities.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Abandoned Mansion at Bukit Kiara
off_the_beaten_path.description: A mysterious abandoned white mansion project in the Bukit Kiara area that has become an intriguing local landmark and subject of urban exploration curiosity.
